name: Southwest Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Stir finely crushed tortilla chips into melted butter and press into the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
3. In a bowl, beat cream cheese with eggs and seasonings. Add shredded cheddar cheese and chopped green chilies. Brown ground beef and drain. Mix with refried beans.
4. Spread cream cheese mixture over baked crust. Spread beef mixture over cream cheese layer. Place pan back in oven for 30 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and spread sour cream over the cheesecake. Refrigerate for 3 hours.
6. Top with chopped green onions, tomatoes, red or yellow bell peppers, black olives, jalapeno (optional), and salsa before unmolding and serving.
